name: JSAB Inspired Soundfont
author: XXTheRobloxx21
description: Just Shapes & Beats& Beats& Beats& Beats(styled Δ & ♫ or just shΔpes & beats, shortened to JSAB, JS&B or JSB) is an rhythm-action SHMUP video game developed and published by Canadian indie team Berzerk Studio. True to its name, Just Shapes & Beats is where players pitted in an arena, avoiding pink shape obstacles that can damage them, all the while music pumps up to the beat. It was released on May 31, 2018 for PC (Steam) and Nintendo Switch, and on February 24, 2019 for macOS and Linux, with a PlayStation 4 (compatible with PlayStation 5) version released in North America regions on May 10, 2019 and on May 30, 2019 for EU/RUS/AUS regions, a Google Stadia version released on June 30, 2020 and Xbox (One & Series S/X) version released on May 31, 2022. DOWNLOAD THE INSPIRED SOUNDFONT NOW!
